Title: Browse device assignments

As a IT or HR operator
I want to see active and historical assignments
So that I can audit device custody

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] HrAssignments combines devices, employees, and assignment records.
- [ ] Assignment rows can be sorted by supported columns.
- [ ] Dates render consistently in UTC/local-safe format.
- [ ] Missing linked records do not crash the table.

Notes: Assignment page received date/avatar QA fixes.
